prompt: A high-end studio portrait of a young man with sharp facial features, styled hair, and a well-groomed beard. He is wearing a black hoodie and layered silver chain necklaces, slightly holding the hood with one hand. He looks directly into the camera with a confident, subtle smile. Background is a solid bold red color, clean and minimal, creating strong contrast with the black outfit. Soft, even studio lighting with slight rim light to define the face and hair. Ultra-realistic skin texture, sharp focus on eyes, 85mm lens look, shallow depth of field, professional photography, 8K resolution.
